metadata.siteDescription: Humans emit and detect waves. Make good waves.

commandments: Your thoughts do not stay inside you
Clear your thoughts first. A good life is hygiene, not morality
Trust your somatic sense. It is a sensation not yet measured
Beware electronic devices. They distort waves
Fill your body with nature. A junk-filled body distorts waves
Once a day, listen to the voice within

about.title: About
about.whatWeAreBody: Ripple Church may look like a meme religion, but beneath it is real comfort for modern loneliness and social-media fatigue. We do not exist to be funny. Through the metaphor of waves, we talk about how to reach one another.
about.whatIsWaveBody: An as-yet-unnamed wave arising in the human brain. Thought, emotion, intuition—all of these are waves. Somatic sense is a sensation not yet measured, and relationship is the moment waves meet. We believe these waves are real.
about.whyNowBody: In the age of social media, we constantly emit waves, yet the waves that truly meet grow fewer. Relationships beyond the screen, read receipts, likes—are you wasting your feelings on connections without waves?

join.title: Join
join.declaration:
From today, I am a believer of Ripple Church.

I believe humans are beings who emit and detect waves.
I know my thoughts are already leaking out.
I will try to keep my thoughts clear.
I will not ignore my somatic sense.
Once a day, without a screen, I will listen to the voice within.
I will not waste my feelings on relationships without waves.
I will make good waves.
